name: Chuck Grassley
stanceSummary: Grassley has argued for strong, unconditional military support to Israel and criticized U.S. restrictions on weapons transfers during the Gaza war. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Grassley criticized proposed restrictions on U.S. military aid to Israel and called for unwavering support.
Grassley joined a Senate resolution condemning efforts to block or condition U.S. weapons transfers to Israel.
